title: Implement private same-VM staging environment
goal: Allow staging and production to run on the same low-cost VM without sharing containers, volumes, or public staging ports.
scope: Parameterize Docker Compose project names so staging and production stacks are isolated.
Document same-VM staging and production .env values.
Run staging smoke and E2E checks through an SSH tunnel from GitHub Actions.
Keep staging private without adding public firewall ports.
verification: Docker Compose config accepts environment-specific project names.
GitHub Actions deploy workflow opens a staging tunnel before smoke checks.
Playwright E2E uses the tunneled staging URL.
Documentation explains required GitHub variables and secrets.
completed_notes: Changed Compose project naming to use COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME with a portfolio fallback.
Added localhost-bound staging port examples for same-VM deployments.
Updated deploy workflow to open an SSH tunnel to the private staging stack before smoke and E2E checks.
Documented SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS and staging tunnel variables in the CI/CD guide.
